chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 124 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of cases 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 03.05.2023 None present for the petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Abdul Hannan Shaikh, Deputy Secretary, and Bhuromal, Law Officer, Services, General Administration and Coordination Department, Government of Sindh <><><><>..<><><><> Learned AAG Sindh files through a statement Guidelines / SOPs dated 28.04.2023 for Departmental Selection Committee constituted under Rule 5 of the Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974 (as amended up to date) for appointment in BPS-01 to BPS-05 and policy for appointment in BPS-05 to BPS-15, which is taken on record. Let in future all appointments for the posts in BPS-01 to BPS-15 for Non-Technical Cadre be made through respective DRCs / DSCs as provided under Rule 11 of the Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974 and Policy Guidelines dated 28.04.2023, strictly following the SOPs in letter and spirit. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI
